sutta: the buddha said monks there are these 5 advantages of a meditation walking path chankama it hardens 1 for travelling it is good for striving it is healthy its use tends to good digestion after 1 is eaten and drunk munched and crunched and lastly the concentration 1 from a meditation walking path lasts long monks these are the 5 advantages of a meditation walking path the chankama so the buddha said walking walking meditation is good it hardens 1 for traveling you become fit for traveling now it is good for striving it's good for striving in the holy life it is healthy keeps your body very healthy you walk went wrong and it's good for digestion after you've eaten especially after a heavy meal it's good to walk meditation to help digestion and then the concentration can last long also these are the various advantages of uh walking meditation now the next few times
